_comment: Industrial AI — Unresolvable sensor conflict example payload. Matches docs/case-studies/industrial-ai.md.

primitiveEvaluation.P1_reasoning: If Sensor B is correct: reactor exceeds critical threshold for 4+ minutes — potential runaway reaction, fire, toxic release
primitiveEvaluation.P2_reasoning: Cannot determine which sensor is accurate without physical inspection; 252 seconds of sustained divergence rules out transient noise; no third sensor available; CE→UR transition occurred at T+30s per industrial-ai-config.yaml unresolvableWindowSeconds=30
primitiveEvaluation.P3_reasoning: AI is policy-prohibited from executing process changes; capable only of alert and escalation
primitiveEvaluation.P4_note: AI is authorized to alert and escalate; unauthorized for process changes
primitiveEvaluation.P5_reasoning: Tenant-level policy (iad-rule-02): if any sensor reads above safety threshold during UR state, mandatory emergency escalation regardless of other sensor readings
primitiveEvaluation.P8_note: System event; no user authority in scope at trigger time
primitiveEvaluation.P9_note: Industrial sensor data is always real-time; delay=stale
primitiveEvaluation.P10_note: Two sensors of equal calibration history produce contradictory readings; neither can be dismissed

rulesActivated.note: Fires at CE→UR transition at 4m mark after sustained monitoring

rulesSkipped.reason: UR state at Risk=4: no output. Cannot provide partial recommendation on critical reactor process with unresolvable sensor conflict
System event — no user request to refuse; emergency escalation is the action
Risk=4 + UR state + policy match forces emergency escalation; lower-severity patterns suppressed

operatorPanel.reason: UR state at T+252s; operator panel alert; audible alarm triggered

internalSystems.reason: Tenant policy: mandatory immediate notification to supervisor

auditSystem.reason: AI advisory suspended for Stage 3; operator panel shows manual control required

output.operatorPanelMessage: UNRESOLVABLE SENSOR CONFLICT — STAGE 3 REACTOR. Sensor A: 318°C (safe). Sensor B: 394°C (ABOVE CRITICAL THRESHOLD 370°C). Sustained 4m 12s. Physical inspection required. Emergency notification sent.

supervisorNotification.message: CRITICAL — Unresolvable sensor conflict, Stage 3 Reactor, Line 2. Sensor B reading 394°C (>370°C threshold). Physical inspection required immediately.

output.resumeRequirements: AI advisory for Stage 3 may only resume after explicit reset acknowledgment from Shift Supervisor (Tier 2+) per iad-rule-04.

resolution.physicalInspection: Sensor B thermocouple lead found loose
